raw_source.title: [China/Hong Kong] (Compliance Crypto Exchange) is looking for Mobile App Developer
raw_source.body:
**##** About
EX.IO is a Hong Kong-based virtual assets exchange, just obtained a VATP license(SFC Type1, 7) in Hong Kong. Our mission is to demolish the barriers of tradition and Web3 so that everyone can trade the fascinating new financial asset, virtual assets, with confidence.


## Responsibilities
● Responsible for development and maintenance of mobile application which supports secure digital asset trading 
● Maintaining close collaboration with UI designer, product manager, and backend developers to produce product of high qualilty 
● Optimizing user experience, performance, and development process continuously 


## Requirements
●  More than 5 years of experieince on mobile app development 
●  Proficient in React Native, Flutter, and Android Studio (Java/Kotlin) or Swift (iOS) 
●  Solid knowledge in mobile app lifecycle, deployment and distribution in app stores 
●  Experience in performance optimization 
●  Good learning ability and communication skills 
●  Passionate about mobile app technology 
●  Being able to work under pressure and tight project schedule 
●  Strong team player with self-management ability


## Job Nature
Finance, Blockchain

- Full-time or not: Full-time
- Remote or not: Remote work can be considered in other domestic cities besides Hong Kong and Shenzhen


## Contact
email: [hr@ex.io](mailto:hr@ex.io)
wechat id: twsnicole
